jobs.basic_qualifications:
- 3+ years of building machine learning models for business application experience
- PhD, or Master's degree and 6+ years of applied research experience
- Experience programming in Java, C++, Python or related language
- Experience with neural deep learning methods and machine learning
- Hands-on experience with designing and prototyping AI solutions for real world applications.
jobs.description:
Prime Video is a first-stop entertainment destination offering customers a vast collection of premium programming in one app available across thousands of devices. Prime members can customize their viewing experience and find their favorite movies, series, documentaries, and live sports – including Amazon MGM Studios-produced series and movies; licensed fan favorites; and programming from Prime Video add-on subscriptions such as Apple TV+, Max, Crunchyroll and MGM+. All customers, regardless of whether they have a Prime membership or not, can rent or buy titles via the Prime Video Store, and can enjoy even more content for free with ads.

Are you interested in shaping the future of entertainment? Prime Video's technology teams are creating best-in-class digital video experience.

As a Prime Video technologist, you’ll have end-to-end ownership of the product, user experience, design, and technology required to deliver state-of-the-art experiences for our customers. You’ll get to work on projects that are fast-paced, challenging, and varied. You’ll also be able to experiment with new possibilities, take risks, and collaborate with remarkable people.

We’ll look for you to bring your diverse perspectives, ideas, and skill-sets to make Prime Video even better for our customers. With global opportunities for talented technologists, you can decide where a career Prime Video Tech takes you!

As a Senior Applied Scientist in the Prime Video Playback Intelligence organization, you will have deep subject matter expertise in applied machine learning and data science, with specializations in video streaming optimization, information retrieval, anomaly detection and root-causing systems, large language models, and generative AI across various modalities.

Key job responsibilities
* You will work with multiple teams of scientists, engineers, and product managers to translate business and functional requirements into concrete deliverables leading strategic efforts to enhance customer quality of experiences.
* Problem spaces you will be working on include: improving the customer playback quality of experience across Video on Demand, Live Events and Linear Content. You’ll aim to reduce the time/cost/effort to optimize the customer experience as well as detect, root-cause, and mitigate defects in the customer experience. You’ll seek to understand the depth and nuance of streaming video at scale and identify opportunities to grow our business and improve customer quality of experience via principled ML/AI solutions. You will also lead integration of new algorithms and processes into existing modeling stacks, simplify and streamline the existing modeling stacks, and develop testing and evaluation strategies. Ultimately, you'll work backwards from the desired outcomes and lead the way on determining the ideal solution (statistical techniques, traditional ML, GenAI, etc).
* You will be responsible for defining key research directions, adopting or inventing new machine learning techniques, conducting rigorous experiments, publishing results, and ensuring that research is translated into practice. You will develop long-term strategies, persuade teams to adopt those strategies, propose goals and deliver on them.
* You will also participate in organizational planning, hiring, mentorship and leadership development. You will be technically fearless and with a passion for building scalable science and engineering solutions. You will serve as a key scientific resource in full-cycle development (conception, design, implementation, testing to documentation, delivery, and maintenance).
* You will also work with external academic partners to support our in-house talent with direct access to cutting edge research and mentoring.

A day in the life
We love solving challenging and hard problems in our quest to innovate on behalf of our customers and provide the best video streaming experience. We push the boundaries to leverage and invent technologies which help create unrivaled experiences for our customers to help us move fast in a growing and changing environment. We use data to guide our decisions, work closely with our engineering and product counterparts, and partner with other Science teams as well as academic institutions to learn and guide in an environment of innovation.

Our team works on several S-Team and SVP goals with significant science dependencies. Your work will have high visibility and will directly impact both customer experience and business outcomes.

jobs.description:
Interested in a team involving data sciences, algorithm development leveraging Artificial Intelligence and an opportunity to impact every Amazon customer?

Unified Intelligent Matching Systems (UIMS) team builds systems that establish product identity, prevent identity defects and enable high fidelity product matching to improve and maintain Amazon catalog identity quality. The solutions ensure sufficient identity quality for product payloads and accurately compare product payloads to determine their homogeneity, enabling correct mapping to existing Amazon catalog items. We are building new systems leveraging existing systems where possible to support the full breadth of Amazon’s global traffic of 1B+ daily transactions under ambitious timelines.

Successful candidates are passionate about translating high-level, ambiguous business goals to software solutions that enable multiple businesses. You are comfortable taking initiative and working alongside top-notch software developers.

Key job responsibilities
An SDE II on the UIMS team works autonomously and delivers significant projects which meet the technical and business requirements. We are building new systems in fast evolving areas - to be successful as an SDE II in the team they should be able to handle ambiguity and operate under tight schedules. They would need to build new services and systems from scratch supporting hundreds of millions of transactions daily built on newly developed AI models while interacting with an established Amazon eco-system. They need to be inquisitive to understand the customer requirements & existing/potential solutions, think critically when working on solutions and show good judgement to balance short- versus long-term program needs. They would need to communicate effectively across multiple stakeholders. An SDE II works with the team and relevant stakeholders to invent, design and build software that is stable and scalable. They need to make continuous improvements identifying engineering and data integrity opportunities. They need to be active in operational support for the team, identifying opportunities and ensure that the root causes are resolved. They would provide meaningful feedback through code reviews or otherwise to the team and mentor junior engineers.
jobs.description_short: Interested in a team involving data sciences, algorithm development leveraging Artificial Intelligence and an opportunity to impact every Amazon customer?Unified Intelligent Matching Systems (UIMS) team

jobs.description:
Amazon Legal is seeking a self-driven, highly organized Executive Assistant to support the Vice President of NA Stores Legal--an organization within the Legal Department that support Amazon.com and Amazon.ca. You will be a key member of our team, understanding leader and team priorities and driving improvements that help us operate more efficiently and effectively. You will be responsible for helping shape the way our organization operates at scale and delivers for our customers every day.

This role requires a great attention to detail, the ability to move quickly and meet deadlines, great organizational skills, and the ability to prioritize across multiple critical requests. High integrity and discretion in handling confidential information and professionalism in dealing with senior professionals inside and outside the company is important. You will need to complete complex tasks and projects quickly in ambiguous situations, react with appropriate urgency to situations that require a quick turnaround, and take effective action without having to know the total picture.

This role requires five (5) days a week in office.


Key job responsibilities
- Management of calendars and scheduling
- Track and help drive completion of key deliverables across the team
- Work closely with the leadership team, recruiting, and other Executive Assistants to provide support to the organization
- Organize, execute, and assist with team activities (staff meeting agendas, all-hands meetings, off-sites, and team social events)
- Act as a liaison for manager’s direct reports
- Management of team space, including moves and reconfigurations
- Manage domestic and international travel and expense reports

jobs.basic_qualifications:
- Plus de 4 ans d'expérience en gestion ou contribution à des programmes de transformation numérique ou cloud d'envergure, couvrant de multiples axes de travail.
- Expérience avérée en développement et maintien de relations avec des directeurs et des responsables techniques et commerciaux de haut niveau au sein d'organisations matricielles complexes.
- Expérience de travail dans le secteur des éditeurs de logiciels indépendants (ISV) ou en collaboration avec celui-ci, incluant une connaissance des modèles commerciaux SaaS, des stratégies de croissance axées sur le produit et des stratégies de commercialisation de logiciels.
- Expérience en gestion de programmes, incluant l'application de méthodologies de livraison structurées et de pratiques d'atténuation des risques.
- Connaissance des concepts d'architecture cloud, des stratégies d'adoption de l'IA, des stratégies de données et des approches de migration vers le cloud.
- Uniquement pour le poste au Québec : la maîtrise du français et de l’anglais est requise en raison de la nature du poste qui exige des interactions avec d’autres entités d’Amazon à l’échelle mondiale et avec les employés et les parties prenantes d’Amazon dans d’autres provinces du Canada.
- ************************
- 4+ years of experience managing or contributing to large-scale digital or cloud transformation programs across multiple workstreams
- Experience building and maintaining relationships with Director-level and senior technical and business stakeholders in complex, matrixed organizations
- Experience working in or with the ISV sector, including knowledge of SaaS business models, product-led growth strategies, and software go-to-market motions
- Experience in program management, including the application of structured delivery methodologies and risk mitigation practices
- Familiarity with cloud architecture concepts, AI adoption strategies, data strategy, and cloud migration approaches
- Only for Quebec location: fluency in French and English is required due to the nature of the role that requires interaction with other Amazon entities globally and with Amazon employees and stakeholders in other provinces in Canada.
jobs.description:
AWS Canada recherche un(e) Responsable de la réussite client (CSM) pour rejoindre son équipe dédiée aux éditeurs de logiciels indépendants (ISV). Ce poste se situe à la croisée de la stratégie technologique, de la transformation des entreprises et du partenariat client.

Vous serez responsable du succès d'un portefeuille d'ISV canadiens engagés dans des transformations pluriannuelles vers le cloud, le SaaS et l'IA. Votre mission est de veiller à ce que ces entreprises ne se contentent pas d'adopter AWS ; elles en tirent un avantage concurrentiel. Cela implique de les aider à migrer leurs charges de travail critiques, à accélérer l'adoption de l'IA et des agents virtuels, et à traduire leurs investissements technologiques en résultats commerciaux mesurables.

Dans ce rôle, vous mettrez en relation les clients ISV avec les experts, les programmes et les équipes AWS les plus adaptés, au moment opportun, et assurerez la coordination au sein d'environnements complexes et multipartites.

Si vous excellez à l'intersection de l'expertise technique et de la stratégie commerciale, et que vous souhaitez que votre travail ait un impact visible et durable sur la croissance des entreprises de logiciels les plus innovantes du Canada, ce poste est fait pour vous.
****************
AWS Canada is looking for a Customer Success Manager (CSM) to join our Independent Software Vendor (ISV) team, a role at the intersection of technology strategy, business transformation, and customer partnership.

You will own the success of a portfolio of Canadian ISVs navigating multi-year cloud, SaaS, and AI transformation journeys. Your job is to ensure these companies don't just adopt AWS; they build competitive advantage on it. That means helping them migrate critical workloads, accelerate AI and agentic capability adoption, and translate their technology investments into measurable business outcomes.

In this role you are connecting ISV customers to the right AWS expertise, programs, and teams at the right time, and holding the thread across complex, multi-stakeholder environments.

If you thrive where technical depth and business strategy intersect, and you want your work to have visible, lasting impact on how Canada's most innovative software companies grow, then this role is for you.

Key job responsibilities
Piloter les résultats clients
- Garantir le succès d'un portefeuille de comptes ISV, en partant des étapes stratégiques clés de chaque client pour définir et mettre en œuvre une stratégie claire de création de valeur.
- Animer des ateliers d'alignement feuille de route/résultats, des réunions d'information pour la direction et des phases de mise en production afin d'accélérer la transition de chaque client vers le cloud et l'IA.
- Aider les ISV à construire la gouvernance, les modèles opérationnels et l'infrastructure de données nécessaires à une transformation durable, et non pas seulement à l'atteinte d'objectifs à court terme.
- Accompagner les clients dans l'adoption de l'IA générative et des capacités agentiques qui redéfinissent la conception, la distribution et la monétisation des logiciels.

Orchestrer les activités sur AWS
- Assurer la liaison entre les clients ISV et les équipes AWS (Ventes, Architecture de solutions, Support, Services professionnels et Partenaires) afin de garantir un engagement coordonné et de qualité.
- Contribuer à la planification des comptes, en traduisant les objectifs stratégiques en actions concrètes, avec des responsabilités et des échéances clairement définies.
- Identifier et lever les obstacles systémiques qui freinent la progression des clients, en intervenant avec précision et réactivité si nécessaire.

Piloter la stratégie Engagements
- Animer des réunions de direction, des ateliers de co-innovation et des sessions de planification stratégique avec les responsables Produits, Ingénierie et Technologie des comptes ISV.
- Contribuer à la traduction de solutions complexes d'IA et de cloud en analyses de rentabilité pour les décideurs, en facilitant la communication entre les équipes techniques et les décideurs exécutifs.
- Accompagner les clients lors de leurs décisions critiques : séquencement de la migration des charges de travail, stratégie d'adoption de l'IA, évolution de l'architecture SaaS.

Gestion rigoureuse
- Maintenir un rythme structuré grâce à des rapports, un suivi et une surveillance de l'état de santé de l'ensemble du portefeuille.
- Appliquer des mécanismes de livraison structurés et des cadres de mesure pour garantir que les clients tirent pleinement profit de leur investissement AWS.
- Identifier proactivement les risques (techniques, organisationnels ou commerciaux) et mettre en œuvre des plans d'atténuation avant qu'ils ne s'aggravent.

Relever les standards en interne
- Remettre en question les idées reçues et prendre des initiatives face aux défis clients, en proposant de nouvelles idées, de nouveaux outils et de nouveaux mécanismes.
- Offrir le meilleur d'AWS et d'Amazon aux clients, en résolvant proactivement leurs problèmes grâce à l'accès à des capacités, des programmes et une expertise émergents dont ils ignorent peut-être l'existence.
- Contribuer à la mise en place de mécanismes reproductibles et à l'amélioration continue des processus internes. L’activation, le partage des enseignements tirés de vos interactions avec les clients afin de rehausser les normes en matière de réussite client chez AWS au Canada.
**************************
Drive Customer Outcomes
- Own the success of a portfolio of ISV accounts, working backwards from each customer's strategic milestones to define and execute a clear path to value realization
- Lead roadmap-to-outcome alignment sessions, Executive Briefing Sessions, and go-live milestones that accelerate each customer's cloud and AI journey
- Help ISVs build the governance, operating models, and data infrastructure needed to sustain long-term transformation, not just hit short-term milestones
- Support customers in adopting generative AI and agentic capabilities that are reshaping how software is built, delivered, and monetized

Orchestrate Across AWS
- Serve as the connective tissue between ISV customers and AWS teams (Sales, Solutions Architecture, Support, Professional Services, and Partner teams) ensuring coordinated, high-quality engagement
- Contribute to account planning, translating strategic goals into executable actions with clear ownership and timelines
- Identify and remove systemic barriers that slow customer progress, escalating with precision and urgency when needed

Lead Strategic Engagements
- Lead director-level engagements, co-innovation workshops, and strategic planning sessions with Product, Engineering, and Technology leadership within ISV accounts
- Help translate complex AI and cloud solutions into business cases for senior stakeholders, bridging the gap between technical teams and executive decision-makers
- Support customers through critical decision points: workload migration sequencing, AI adoption strategy, SaaS architecture evolution

Manage with Rigor
- Maintain structured cadence through reporting, tracking, and health monitoring across your portfolio
- Apply structured delivery mechanisms and measurement frameworks to ensure customers realize the value of their AWS investment
- Proactively identify risks (technical, organizational, or commercial) and drive mitigation plans before they become escalations

Raise the Bar Internally
- Challenge conventional thinking and take initiative on customer challenges, bringing new ideas, tools, and mechanisms to problems
- Bring the best of AWS and Amazon to customers, proactively solving problems by connecting them to emerging capabilities, programs, and expertise they may not know exist
- Contribute to repeatable mechanisms and internal enablement, sharing learnings from your customer engagements to help raise the bar for how AWS delivers customer success in Canada.

About the team
Vous n'avez pas besoin de construire l'infrastructure cloud, mais vous devez la comprendre suffisamment pour gagner la confiance des ingénieurs qui s'en chargent.

Au quotidien, vous pourriez aider un vice-président ou directeur produit d'une entreprise SaaS canadienne à comprendre les enjeux commerciaux de la migration de sa plateforme principale vers AWS, animer une séance de concertation entre l'équipe d'ingénierie d'un éditeur de logiciels indépendant et l'architecture des solutions AWS, ou collaborer avec votre équipe interne pour débloquer une migration bloquée qui risque de ne pas respecter son échéance de mise en production.

Vous travaillerez avec certaines des entreprises de logiciels les plus innovantes du Canada à un moment charnière, où l'IA transforme en profondeur la façon dont les logiciels sont conçus, distribués et monétisés. Si vous excellez dans un environnement où l'expertise technique et une communication claire sont tout aussi importantes, ce poste est fait pour vous.
***********************
You don't need to build cloud infrastructure, but you need to understand it well enough to earn the trust of the engineers who do.

On any given day, you might help a VP/Director of Product at a Canadian SaaS company understand the business case for migrating their core platform to AWS, facilitate an alignment session between an ISV's engineering team and AWS Solutions Architecture, or work with your internal team to unblock a stalled migration that's at risk of missing its go-live milestone.

You'll be working with some of Canada's most innovative software companies at a pivotal moment, when AI is fundamentally changing how software is built, delivered, and monetized. If you thrive in environments where technical depth and clear communication are equally valued, this role is for you.

- Experience supporting or advising ISVs through SaaS platform migrations, re-architecture, or AI capability integration

- --------------------------------

- Expérience en accompagnement ou conseil auprès d'éditeurs de logiciels indépendants (ISV) lors de migrations de plateformes SaaS, de réarchitectures ou d'intégration de solutions d'IA

- The candidate must possess strong written and verbal communication skills, solid organizational and risk assessment abilities, and an aptitude for utilizing AI
jobs.description:
With over 200 million members across more than 26 countries, Amazon Prime is one of the world's largest subscription businesses. The Prime Accounting team supports Amazon’s Prime subscription businesses, and is responsible for the revenue generated through direct-to-consumer and B2B sales channels.

This position requires a self-starter who will be responsible for supporting new geography expansions, tech debt resolution, in addition to supporting various aspects of our monthly accounting and reporting process. If you are a financial accounting professional who consistently exceeds expectations, who dares to make bold decisions, and whose ears perk up at the prospect of a challenge, then Amazon is a place where your career can flourish.

When working at Amazon, your ability to make a difference and take ownership of your career begins on day one. You can expect a collaborative, team-driven environment that encourages employees to learn, be curious, and have a bias for action. Part of this propensity for continuous learning shows itself in Amazon’s strong encouragement of movement and growth within the Accounting department and within the company as a whole. We aim to hire and develop those who will raise the bar over the course of their career at Amazon (and not just in their first position).


Key job responsibilities
• Responsible for the monthly accounting close including preparing journal entries, analyzing and explaining fluctuations and variances, and providing meaningful financial reporting to management.
• Prepare and review account reconciliations.
• Collaborate with cross-functional business partners including Finance, Operations, Tax, and Technology teams to maintain flow of communication and support.
• Understand relevant accounting principles and communicate the application of GAAP to peers and business partners.
• Analyze current procedures. Recommend, develop, and drive process improvements to achieve efficiency and scalability.
• Collaborate with technical teams to resolve issues related to unprocessed system transactions.
• Support external audit process and escalates any inefficiency to management
• Assess internal controls, identify gaps in the control process, and design additional controls to solve deficiencies.
• Contribute to manual effort reduction projects.

jobs.company_name: Servicios Comerciales Amazon Mexico S. de R.L. de C.V.
jobs.description:
We are looking for a motivated program manager to lead transportation technology roadmap for Mexico business and bring MX operations to global standards.

Key job responsibilities
In this role, you will:

· Own and execute product roadmap for ATS transportation related products in Mexico
· Work with key stakeholders across various functions to plan and execute launches of new tech products
· Launch and expand the product as per Amazon’s requirements while being responsible for all customer and operator satisfaction, performance, compliance, financial related metrics.
· Use customer and market feedback, competitive analysis, and business metrics to make informed decisions
· Exhibit program and product expertise that connects, understands, and leverages company-wide assets and capabilities
· Evaluate launch outcomes and reintegrate learning into the organization and product plan

This role calls for an individual who can own all aspects of leveraging global technology to driver the highest-bar operator experience; manage performance and measure, determine, then drive, any initiatives necessary to improve it. It requires an individual to showcase judgment and decision-making skills to balance customer experience with financial impact. This position offers a broad exposure to various business, financial, and technical teams within Amazon.

The successful candidate will be a person who enjoys and excels at dealing with ambiguity and design and define products with little information. She/he will have excellent written and verbal communication skills, the ability to create and sustain urgency, and a proven ability to lead large cross-functional projects including communication across all levels and teams in the organization: senior leaders, technical teams, finance, fulfillment, and business leaders.

jobs.company_name: Servicios Comerciales Amazon Mexico S. de R.L. de C.V.
jobs.description:
At Amazon, we're working to be the most customer-centric company on earth. To get there, we need exceptionally talented, bright, and driven people.

One of our main goals is to exceed the expectations of our customers by ensuring that their orders, no matter how large or small, are delivered as quickly, accurately, and cost effectively as possible. To meet this goal, we are continually striving to innovate and provide best in class service levels through excellence performance.

Amazon is seeking a Expansion Program Manager for Mexico, in this role, you’ll help translate business needs into actionable projects with clear expectations and metrics. Engage and follow up with support teams to execute projects. You’ll partner with Operations to align on expectations, confirm project status, anticipate potential risks, and drive strategic decisions to ensure project success.
Mexico Expansion Program Manager, understand business needs, and help create an action plan with clear dates, owners and dependencies. Continuously coordinates with execution teams and follows up with operations. Drives project updates avoiding impact to project objectives, and leads discussions for leadership decisions. Will work on continuous improvement initiatives for the team. Constant hands-on approach is required to ensure project targets.
This role leads investment projects in Mexico to help improve customer experience and business requirements through Program Manager best practices by coordinating with support teams and reporting to Transportation leaders.
Job specifics:

Availability to work From Monday to Friday on a 5 day schedule.
This role is not a remote position, attendance on site is required.

Key job responsibilities
• Own and develop the project management and change management program for investment projects.
• Support project owners and support teams throughout their project lifetime from conception, feasibility, project planning and execution.
• Communicate with project owners and engaging with various stakeholder teams, ensuring positive and effective collaboration between teams.
• Drive projects to improve, expand and standardize MX operations, based on business objectives.
• Develop and enforce a culture of continuous improvement.
• Drive end to end process excellence, anticipating risks and communicating effectively to leaders through formal reports, business papers and risk analysis best practices.










A day in the life
As MX Expansion Program Manager, you’ll help translate business needs into actionable projects with clear expectations and metrics. Engage and follow up with support teams to execute projects. You’ll partner with Operations to align on expectations, confirm project status, anticipate potential risks, and drive strategic decisions to ensure project success.
MX Expansion PMs understand business needs, and help create an action plan with clear dates, owners and dependencies. Continuously coordinates with execution teams and follows up with operations. Drives project updates avoiding impact to project objectives, and leads discussions for leadership decisions. Will work on continuous improvement initiatives for the team. Constant hands-on approach is required to ensure project targets.

About the team
Amazon Mexico Expansion makes sure Logistics requirements are adequately translated into actionable projects with clear expectations aligned with business goals. Our team closely follows up the end-to-end project life-cycle to anticipate risks, help remove obstacles, and ensure cost, time and quality for every project. As part of continuous improvement efforts, the team works closely with Operations and stakeholders to remove compliance or safety risks in our operating facilities. We thrive in anticipating needs and risks, though solid planning, effective project management, and adjusting quickly to meet business requirements.

jobs.company_name: Servicios Comerciales Amazon Mexico S. de R.L. de C.V.
jobs.description:
Our Senior Operations Managers play a crucial role in exceeding expectations and providing a superb customer experience; critical to Amazon’s success which is built on a foundation of customer obsession, and innovation. This position is a multi-faceted role requiring the ability to balance strategy and execution. The Senior Operations Manager is responsible for all aspects of the operations of a functional area for one of our Fulfillment Centers including, people management and development, process, and meeting or exceeding the expectations and promise made to our customers. You will lead a dynamic team of Operations and Area Managers to achieve operational excellence through coaching and mentoring the team; driving employee engagement, and building leadership bench strength within the Fulfillment Center.

As a senior leader you will oversee upwards of 1,000+ salaried and hourly employees, in a fast-paced, complex operations facility up to a million square feet.

Our Senior Operations Managers serve as the face of the organization to potentially thousands of employees and the community where the center is located. This position offers unlimited career potential as we continue to grow our global footprint.



Key job responsibilities
•Owns and delivers the operational budget for functional area, including safety, productivity, financial planning, labor planning, and operational goals.
•Responsible for providing strategic level/long-term planning (3, 6, and 12 months out), including labor planning, rate forecasting, and peak season planning.
•Drives continuous improvement projects to optimize operations and improve productivity to meet and exceed business objectives; works on strategic projects that have total building and network-wide impact.
•Effectively leverages Operations and Area Managers to solicit ideas and understand problems and challenges in the building.
•Networks with other leaders across the network to solicit and share process improvements and drive efficiencies and cost savings.
•Establishes objectives and metrics for safety, quality, productivity, and customer experience.
•Sets clear goals and expectations for Operations and Area Managers; measures performance, provides feedback, and holds leaders accountable.
•Mentors and develops leaders and staff.
•Participates in recruiting to identify and evaluate associates and internal/external candidates for promotion and hire.
•Works closely with support staff (HR, Finance, •Maintenance Engineering, Safety, IT, and other leaders) to build and secure support and resources for projects and initiatives.

About the team
Inclusive team culture
At Amazon we embrace our differences and we are committed to furthering our culture of inclusion. We host annual and ongoing learning experiences. Amazon’s culture of inclusion is reinforced within our 14 Leadership Principles, which remind team members to seek diverse perspectives, learn and be curious, and earn trust.
 
Work Life Balance
We believe striking the right balance between your personal and professional life is critical to life-long happiness and fulfillment. We offer flexibility in working hours and encourage you to find your own balance between your work and personal lives.
 
Mentorship & Career Growth
Our team is dedicated to supporting new members. We have a broad mix of experience levels and tenures, and we’re building an environment that celebrates knowledge sharing and mentorship. We care about your career growth and strive to assign projects based on what will help each team member develop into a better-rounded professional.

- 3+ years of finance or a related analytical field experience
- Bachelor's degree in accounting or related field
jobs.description:
Amazon is a pioneering and dynamic company that thrives on unique and peculiar ways. We take pride in our single-minded obsession over customer satisfaction and our ability to maintain a curious culture no matter how large the company grows. We endeavor to build our legacy as Earth’s most customer-centric company and to continue to cultivate and nourish our innovative environment through our mission to hire the best. If you are a financial accounting professional who consistently exceeds expectations, who dares to make bold decisions, and whose ears perk up at the prospect of a challenge, then Amazon is a place where your career can flourish.

When working at Amazon, your ability to make a difference and take ownership of your career begins on day one. You can expect a collaborative, team-driven environment that encourages employees to learn, be curious, and have a bias for action. Part of this propensity for continuous learning shows itself in Amazon’s strong encouragement of movement and growth within the Accounting department and within the company as a whole. We aim to hire and develop those who will raise the bar over the course of their career at Amazon (and not just in their first position). Amazon’s accounting group offers opportunities at the Senior Accountant level in Legal Entity & Intercompany, Accounting Policy & Reporting, Operations and Capital, Transportation, Payments & Merchant Services, Retail Operations, Digital, and AWS Accounting.

This role will support the accounting of Amazon CAPEX & Leasing across North America. Including the implementation of process improvements, automations and launch of new businesses.

Key job responsibilities
• Supporting various aspects of our accounting and reporting process.
• Understanding accounting and financial principles and how to apply them.
• Understand internal control design concepts sufficient to assess the effectiveness of controls in their area and to design new processes and controls for emerging and growing business activities.
• Execute judgments to keep projects moving and ensure the right decisions are reached to close the books each month.
• Strong sense of ownership.
• Analysis of complex processes and systems data.
